frontmatter.title: The Algocount Datasprint on Digital Methods
frontmatter.text: During the Data Sprint participants worked on research projects in small groups. Each group, composed by researchers in  Design and Social and Political Sciences focused on gathering and visualising data related to a specific social media platform.
frontmatter.authors: Alessandro Gandini, Giulia Giorgi, Ilir Rama, Vincenzo Luise, Alessandro Gerosa, Riccardo Pronzato, Michele Grilli, Irene Avossa, Camilla Volpe, Emma Sanzogni, Rebecca Marino, Emma Fortunati , Laura Bruschi, Ludovica Corponi, Michele Mauri, Beatrice Gobbo, Antonella Autuori, Maria de Los Angeles Briones Rojas, Tommaso Elli, Alessandra Facchin, Andrea Elena Febres Medina, Giovanni Lombardi
